## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10.7

### 🎥 Cameras
- Queues Home Assistant ICE candidates until X-Sense returns the SDP answer, matching the WebRTC ordering used by the working camera path.
- Keeps the current HLS recording playback path and removes the old Pion/MP4 playback bridge code from the active integration surface.

### 🧯 Alarms
- Restores legacy standalone self-test paths for supported Wi-Fi smoke/combo models.
- Aligns more mute payloads with the APK command shape, including alarm mute type handling and second-generation SBS50 child-device shadows.

### 🧩 Adapter
- Keeps the vendored `python_xsense` adapter aligned with the current backport branch behavior.
- Drops the inferred SD-playback event marker when a history record does not include an actual playback URL.
